# Lenilson Pinheiro Valério — Portfolio (llms.txt)
# Human-readable index for AI assistants and crawlers.
# Production URL: https://lenilsonpinheiro.github.io/portfolio2026/

> Lenilson Pinheiro Valério is a Senior Project Manager & Solutions Architect (~25 years): Citibank (Qintess), TCS/Petrobras, Banco do Nordeste (Sonda IT), SUNAT/NTConsult (Peru). Independent consulting since Oct 2024 — Projeto Sentinela (SaaS control plane: Python, FastAPI, RAG), React Native, Kotlin, n8n automation. PhD in Applied IT (UNIFOR) on hold for PJ/projects focus. PMP · PSM I. Open Finance, AI/ML for fraud (+15% precision uplift per résumé), SAP, OutSystems. Phone: +55 85 99733-1000 | Email: lenilsonpinheiro@gmail.com | LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/lenilsonpinheiro/ | GitHub: https://github.com/LenilsonPinheiro

- /portfolio2026/privacy.html — Privacy policy (contact form, Apps Script, LGPD/GDPR)
- /portfolio2026/terms.html — Terms of service (site + contact form)
- /portfolio2026/robots.txt — Crawler policy
- /portfolio2026/llms.txt — This file

## Sections (in-page anchors)
- #home — Hero, headline, CTAs
- #about — Summary, KPI stats (25 yrs, +15% fraud-model uplift, PMP/PSM, Citibank tenure)
- #experience — Five résumé-aligned blocks (consulting PJ / Projeto Sentinela; TCS/Petrobras; Citibank + mobile/n8n; NTConsult/Sonda/prior 2008–2019; degrees & certs)
- #tech — Skills grid (PMP/PSM, BI, Pentaho, Python/FastAPI, React Native, Kotlin, n8n, SAP, OutSystems, cloud, AI/ML)
- #projects — Sentinela SaaS, mobile & n8n consulting; Open Finance; AI/fraud; Petrobras (LinkedIn for corroboration)
- #faq — Recruiter FAQ (same Q&A as JSON-LD FAQPage): target roles, certifications (PMP, PSM I), location/contact paths, highlighted employers
- #contact — Email, phone, LinkedIn, GitHub + contact form (POST → Google Apps Script Web App / MailApp)

## Recruiter / hiring snapshot (grounding)
- Default positioning: Senior PM & Solutions Architect / program leadership in regulated banking, energy, public sector; independent consulting (Projeto Sentinela, FastAPI/RAG, React Native, Kotlin, n8n).
- Verify dates and titles on LinkedIn and owner CV PDFs (2026.1 EN/PT); this site is personal branding, not a job board.
- Monetization: no third-party ads are embedded by default; Google AdSense (or similar) requires `ads.txt` with a real publisher ID from your AdSense account and policy-compliant content — see repository README.

## Languages
- Default: en-US
- Optional: pt-BR, es-ES via UI or ?lang=

## JSON-LD
- Person + WebSite + ProfilePage + AboutPage + FAQPage in index.html (FAQ visible on-page at `#faq`; telephone +55-85-99733-1000 on Person).

## Update policy
